creator: sinaptia

evidence.text: LLM evaluation engine for Rails. # RubyLLM::Evals Test, compare, and improve your LLM prompts within your Rails application. ## Installation > [!NOTE] > This engine relies on ActiveJob, ActiveStorage, and [RubyLLM](https://github.com/crmne/ruby_llm). Make sure you have them installed and configured. Add this line to your application's Gemfile: ```ruby gem "ruby_llm-evals" ``` And then execute: ```bash $ bundle ``` To copy and migrate RubyLLM::Evals's migrations, run: ``` $ rails ruby_llm_evals:install:migrations db:migrate ``` And then mount the engine in your `config/routes.rb`: ```ruby
